raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is stacked on top of box_1 and its left/right/front sides are accessible; sufficient clearance exists to insert both end-effectors to the left and right sides of box_2 without contacting the table or box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely lifted and supported by both arms and is no longer resting on box_1, clearing the top of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (clear area to the right of box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held securely by both arms; the placement region on the table to the right of box_1 is reachable and free of obstacles.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released, leaving box_1 unobstructed from above."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The top of box_1 is no longer blocked by box_2; the left and right sides of box_1 are accessible and there is enough lateral clearance for both end-effectors to contact and clamp the box without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely lifted and supported by both arms and is no longer resting on the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is stacked on top of box_1 and its left/right/front sides are accessible; sufficient clearance exists to insert both end-effectors to the left and right sides of box_2 without contacting the table or box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely lifted and supported by both arms and is no longer resting on box_1, clearing the top of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table (clear area to the right of box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held securely by both arms; the placement region on the table to the right of box_1 is reachable and free of obstacles.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released, leaving box_1 unobstructed from above.

parsed_json.Precondition: The top of box_1 is no longer blocked by box_2; the left and right sides of box_1 are accessible and there is enough lateral clearance for both end-effectors to contact and clamp the box without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely lifted and supported by both arms and is no longer resting on the table.
